name: Kaylen
ai_summary: Energetic 23-year-old with daycare experience at Sunbright Learning Center, CPR/first aid certified, available FT/PT with a 30mi drive radius. Strong fit due to open-minded, sweet nature and passion for helping children learn and interact.
